name: cireta-vids
description: Cireta brand video template system — Remotion + ElevenLabs VO pipeline

scripts.render: npx remotion render src/Root.tsx CiretaVideo output/cireta-final.mp4 --concurrency=4
scripts.render:fast: npx remotion render src/Root.tsx CiretaVideo output/cireta-final.mp4 --concurrency=8
scripts.still: npx remotion still src/Root.tsx CiretaVideo output/preview.png --frame=750

author: Big Immersive
